name: event-submission-layer
description: Frontend event submission and management for Sugar Calendar Lite

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run copy-assets && npm run copy-plugin
scripts.copy-assets: mkdir -p dist/assets/css dist/assets/js && cp node_modules/flatpickr/dist/flatpickr.min.css dist/assets/css/ && cp node_modules/flatpickr/dist/flatpickr.min.js dist/assets/js/
scripts.copy-plugin: cp event-manager.php dist/ && cp README.md dist/
scripts.dev: npm run build && echo 'Plugin built successfully in dist/'
scripts.watch: npm run build && echo 'Watching for changes...'

author: Your Name
